title: Priorities | Lee Dillon MP
meta_description: Lee Dillon’s key priorities as MP for Newbury include tackling the cost-of-living crisis, the NHS, improving housing, education, and local infrastructure.
text_excerpt: --> Priorities | Lee Dillon MP top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Priorities NHS Improving access to GPs, pharmacies, and dental services for all constituents. Cost-of-Living Crisis Protecting homes and local environments by addressing chronic flooding and sewage problems. Flooding & Sewage Supporting those hardest hit by rising costs, with a focus on affordability, fair wages, and household bills. SEND & Education Championing high-quality education for every child, and pushing for specialised support for students with Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND). Housing Ensuring secure, affordable homes for all, with a focus on housing access, rental protections, and sustainable development. Rural Economy Standing up for rural communities in farming and food security to equestrian road safety.Backing local farmers, supporting the horse racing industry, fighting for better rural connectivity, and ensuring villages and countryside voices are heard loud and clear in Westminster. lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP.
